edge_hypothesis: ea9p5k2m proved that narrowing RSI entry bands from 40-70 to 50-65 transforms ema_rsi_atr from PF ~1.03 to PF 1.288 (ACCEPT). The mechanism: narrow bands above the 50 neutral line select only entries with unambiguous directional momentum. This spec applies the SAME principle to rsi_pullback — but inverted. rsi_pullback's default rsi_long_max=40 requires deep pullbacks (RSI ≤ 40). In a ranging/bear market, RSI < 40 often means genuine reversal, not pullback. By RAISING rsi_long_max to 48-55, we catch 'shallow dips' where RSI briefly dips from 60 to 48-52, then resumes upward. These are momentum continuation pauses, not reversals. Combined with EMA_100 (faster trend detection than EMA_200) and EMA_50 slope (faster momentum response), this creates a 'fast trend, shallow dip, momentum continuation' strategy. The narrow-band principle is the same as ea9p5k2m but the TEMPLATE is different (rsi_pullback vs ema_rsi_atr), testing whether the finding generalizes across signal families. Regime assumption: RANGING (shallow dips in ranging markets are mean-reversion opportunities, not trend reversals). Invalidation: if PF < 0.95 with 50+ trades, shallow pullbacks are not reliable continuation signals and rsi_pullback genuinely requires deep dips (RSI ≤ 40) to filter noise.

variants.name: shallow_dip_rsi50_7to1
variants.description: Core narrow-band variant: rsi_long_max=50 (up from default 40). Only enters long when RSI is between 0 and 50 — momentum has paused but not reversed. EMA_100 for trend (faster than default 200), EMA_50 for slope. 7:1 R:R. Tests whether the 10-point RSI band raise from 40 to 50 improves signal quality by catching continuation dips rather than reversal dips.
entry_long: Close above EMA_100 confirms uptrend (faster trend than EMA_200).
EMA_50 slope rising confirms momentum direction.
RSI_14 ≤ 50 — shallow dip, momentum paused but not reversed.
entry_short: EMA_50 slope falling confirms downward momentum.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 1h and 4h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (10.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: RSI 50 threshold may admit too many entries where momentum is genuinely fading
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 10.5x ATR_14 from entry (7:1 R:R).

components.notes: rsi_pullback baseline — EMA_100 faster trend detection
rsi_pullback confirmation — narrow band rsi_long_max=50 (shallow dip)

variants.name: shallow_dip_rsi55_8to1
variants.description: Wider shallow-dip window: rsi_long_max=55 admits entries where RSI is still mildly bullish (50-55). The hypothesis: in strong uptrends, RSI rarely drops below 50 — a dip to RSI 52 is already a significant pullback. By accepting RSI up to 55, we capture the shallowest momentum pauses that are highest-conviction continuation trades. 8:1 R:R.
entry_long: RSI_14 ≤ 55 — very shallow dip, momentum barely paused.
entry_short: RSI_14 ≥ 45 — very shallow bounce in downtrend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 1h and 4h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: RSI 55 may be too permissive, admitting entries that are not pullbacks at all
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry (8:1 R:R).

variants.name: shallow_dip_rsi48_9to1_timecap
variants.description: Tightest narrow band (rsi_long_max=48) combined with ea9p5k2m's proven 6-bar time cap and 9:1 R:R. This is the 'best of both worlds' variant: narrow RSI band (ea9p5k2m principle) + time cap (ea9p5k2m proven) + fast trend EMA_100 (rsi_pullback advantage). If ea9p5k2m's success was due to narrow bands AND time caps, this variant combines both on a different template family.
entry_long: RSI_14 ≤ 48 — narrow pullback zone (just below neutral).
entry_short: RSI_14 ≥ 52 — narrow bounce zone (just above neutral).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 1h and 4h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (13.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Exit on max bars in trade (6 bars) — time cap.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: RSI 48 combined with 6-bar cap may produce very few completed trades
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 13.5x ATR_14 from entry (9:1 R:R).
Time cap: exit at bar 6 if neither stop nor TP hit.

components.notes: ATR-based stop/TP, 6-bar time cap from ea9p5k2m
